meta.title: Habitat One — Transparent building & materials in Jávea/Xàbia
meta.description: Habitat One is an experience center for innovative, high-quality building materials in Jávea/Xàbia. Full transparency on products, suppliers, prices and margins — plus a trusted network of architects, contractors, lawyers and gestors.

hero.eyebrow: The transparent way to build in Spain
hero.title: See, Feel & Experience.
hero.subtitle: Habitat One is an experience center for innovative, high-quality building materials. See, feel and compare — with full transparency on products, suppliers, prices and margins, and a trusted network that supports your entire project.

home.onestopTitle: Building and renovating can be done differently.
home.onestopLead: Not a contractor, architect or realtor — but a transparent materials and building platform with an experience center, connecting you to the knowledge, materials, prices and the right network to realise your project successfully.
home.onestopBlock1Text: In our experience center you discover carefully selected materials, innovative applications and high-quality finishes — not from a catalogue, but by truly seeing, feeling and comparing them.
home.onestopBlock2Text: We show where materials come from, what they cost and how our pricing is built up. No hidden margins, no unclear middle layers — you always know where you stand.
home.onestopBlock3Text: We connect you directly with architects, contractors, lawyers and gestors we personally know and trust — for every phase of your project.
home.onestopBlock4Text: Many clients are still in their home country. If you buy your materials through Habitat One, we handle the direction, oversight and guidance right through to completion.
home.magicLead: Real natural stone that bends to the wall — lighter than tile, in sheets up to 1.2 × 3.06 m. We chose it because the warmth of travertine, wood and earth can land anywhere in the house: walls, ceilings, furniture, façades.
home.magicPoint1Text: Travertine, burnt wood, concrete, limestone — more than thirty finishes under one collection.
home.magicPoint2Text: Large sheets, joined continuously. No tile grid — the surface of real stone.
home.magicPoint3Text: Stands up to salt, sun and damp. Indoor and out, on flat or curved surfaces.
home.featuredLead: Large-format travertine with delicate veining and a warm Roman cast. Bends to curved walls, asks for no grout — and holds the sun- and hand-warmth that old Jávea/Xàbia stone has by nature.
home.featuredCaption: On site · Flexibel Stone in a Jávea/Xàbia villa
home.story1Line3: The calm of concrete, without the weight
home.story2Line2: Warm beige tones — Roman and timeless
home.pillarsTitle: Access to the right products, people and information
home.pillarsText: Habitat One gives you access to the right products, the right people and the right information — without hidden middle layers.
home.pillarMaterialsText: Innovative, high-quality materials, selected for quality, design and price — and there to experience for real in our experience center.
home.pillarPropertiesText: Realtors, investors and project specialists we personally know — we put you directly in touch with the right party for every phase.
home.pillarLegalText: Lawyers and gestors from our network arrange purchase, NIE, permits and paperwork — in your language.
home.pillarDesignText: Independent architects and contractors we trust and dare to recommend — for the design and execution of your project.
home.spacesText: Indoors and out — explore curated materials and ideas for each part of the Mediterranean home.
home.materialsText: Innovative, high-quality materials that stand out in quality, durability and design — not just to look at, but to experience, compare and understand.
home.productsText: A glimpse of the pieces we specify most for kitchens, bathrooms and façades in Jávea/Xàbia.
home.rangeText: From bathrooms to lighting — Habitat One supplies the whole interior. Explore the rest of the range.
home.projectsText: On every project the before and the after sit side by side — see how a tired house on the Costa Blanca becomes a calm, light-filled Mediterranean home.
home.processText: One clear process in which you always know where you stand — from the first idea to completion.
home.step1Text: We get to know your project, budget and wishes and think along about the possibilities.
home.step2Text: In the experience center you see, feel and compare materials — with full transparency on origin, price and margin.
home.step3Text: We connect you with architects, contractors, lawyers and gestors we personally trust.
home.step4Text: The partners carry out the work; we keep the direction, oversight and guidance for you — even from a distance.
home.step5Text: Your project is delivered with full overview and no surprises — and we stay reachable for what comes next.
home.testimonialsTitle: Homes, and the people in them
home.locationTitle: Sun on the Montgó, salt in the air
home.locationText: Between the Montgó massif and the cliffs of the Cap de la Nau, Jávea/Xàbia is one of the Mediterranean's most protected microclimates — 320 days of sun, pine-clad hills, three distinct bays and a stone-built old town. It's the reason we only work here.
home.locationPoint1: Old Town, the Port and the Arenal — three Jávea/Xàbias, one town
home.locationPoint2: A protected microclimate around the Montgó natural park
home.locationPoint3: Blue-Flag beaches and hidden coves on the Cap de la Nau
home.locationPoint4: Tosca stone, whitewash and lime — the local building language
home.ctaText: Visit our experience center in Jávea/Xàbia and experience the materials for real. Gather inspiration and discuss your project with our team.

materials.title: Materials
materials.intro: Natural-looking, climate-ready surfaces for floors, walls and façades. Every finish in our library is chosen for how it lives in Mediterranean sun, salt and shade.
materials.noProducts: Talk to us about products in this material.

descriptions.travertine: Travertine-look panels — warm earth tones and a timeless, classic feel for floors, walls and façades.
descriptions.concrete: Concrete and cement looks with a sleek, industrial calm — versatile and durable, indoors and out.
descriptions.wood-look: Panels with a natural wood texture — the warmth of timber with the easy maintenance of stone.
descriptions.natural-stone: Light stone panels inspired by granite, limestone and sandstone — the look and feel of real natural stone.
descriptions.rammed-earth: Rammed-earth looks with layered, organic textures — raw, warm and full of character.
descriptions.terrazzo: Terrazzo and textured surfaces — playful, speckled and characterful.
descriptions.solid-surface: Seamless solid-surface elements — baths, basins and shower trays, warm to the touch and repairable.
descriptions.acrylic: Translucent acrylic sheets — modern, light and sculptural.
descriptions.glass-mirror: Glass and mirror elements that make a bathroom feel bright and spacious.
descriptions.brushed-metal: Towel bars, taps, hooks and hinges in matte brushed metal — the finishing details.
descriptions.xps-backer: Lightweight backer boards as a stable base for wall panels and tiling.

products.title: Products
products.intro: The pieces we specify most for Costa Blanca homes — large-format wall boards, solid-surface bathware, mirrors, hardware and more.
products.leadCollectionLead: Flexibel Stone is the heart of our collection — flexible natural-stone panels for walls, ceilings, furniture and façades. The other collections (bathroom, doors, accessories) round out the brief.
products.otherCollectionsLead: Curated to round out the signature collection — chosen to sit beside it in the same Mediterranean register.
products.lookbookLead: Different Flexibel Stone collections in real spaces — tap through to the product.
products.catalogueLead: Flexibel Stone leads — followed by bathroom, doors and accessories tuned to the same Mediterranean register. Scroll to meet each chapter.
products.chapterDescriptionWallPanels: Flexible natural-stone panels — travertine, burnt wood, concrete, limestone — in sheets up to 1.2 × 3.06 m. Wraps curved walls and ceilings, installed without grout.
products.chapterDescriptionBathroom: Solid-surface tubs, basins and shower trays — warm to touch and repairable. Seamless pieces that bring quiet to a bathroom.
products.chapterDescriptionDoors: Solid interior doors tuned to the same timber palette as the wall panels — for continuous surfaces from floor to ceiling.
products.chapterDescriptionDoorAccessories: Hinges in brushed matt metal — the finishing detail.
products.chapterDescriptionAccessories: Mirrors, towel bars, hooks and small sanitary pieces — chosen to sit with the lead collection.
products.browseAllLead: Filter by room, material or collection and browse all {count} products.
products.chapterDescriptionFlowerPots: Sculptural planters in a concrete look — the Boge and Epocco series. Frost- and UV-resistant, for terrace, garden and interior, in sand, salt, concrete grey, graphite, red ochre and macchiato.
products.chapterDescriptionLighting: Architectural lighting by George Lighting — track spots and wall and in-ground spots (IP65) in brushed bronze. For a refined, considered play of light, indoors and out.
products.chapterDescriptionSwitches: Switch gear by George Lighting — stainless-steel rocker and toggle switches, sockets, dimmers and a hotel panel in brushed bronze. Refined control that suits the interior.
products.chapterDescriptionAcrylicPanels: Translucent acrylic solid-surface panels — a warm, backlit alternative to natural onyx. For feature walls, bathrooms, bars and light objects, indoors and out.
products.chapterDescriptionFireplaces: Water-vapour fireplaces with a lifelike 3D flame of water mist and LED — no smoke, no heat. 128 adjustable flame colours, app control and a sleek matt-black finish. Available from 70 to 300 cm, as a see-through or built-in hearth.
products.chapterDescriptionPVCFloors: PVC floors with a realistic wood look — hard-wearing, water-resistant and quiet underfoot. Easy click-system installation, suited to homes and commercial spaces. Available in warm and smoked oak tones, in planks and herringbone.

hotelpaneel-niet-storen.name: Hotel Panel ‘Do Not Disturb / Make Up / Bell’

products.chapterDescriptionBackerBoards: Lightweight XPS backer boards — a stable, waterproof base for wall panels and tiling. Available from 6 to 30 mm.

backerFeatures.applicationsTitle: The waterproof base behind beautiful walls
backerFeatures.applicationsLead: XPS backer boards are the hidden layer that makes wet rooms work — a stable, fully waterproof substrate for shower walls, niches, benches, wall-hung frames and large-format tiling. From 6 to 30 mm, indoors and out.
backerFeatures.techTitle: Engineered for water, weight and heat
backerFeatures.techLead: A rigid extruded-polystyrene (XPS) core under a fibreglass-reinforced cement facing — light to carry, strong under tile, and stable in heat and damp.
backerFeatures.point1Text: The closed-cell core doesn't absorb water — ideal behind showers, around baths and in any wet area.
backerFeatures.point2Text: A fraction of the weight of cement board, yet stable enough to carry large-format tiles and stone panels.
backerFeatures.point3Text: Built with a fire-retardant formulation. The full fire classification is listed on the technical datasheet.
backerFeatures.point4Text: The mineral-coated surface resists mould and won't rot or swell — durable in steam and salt air.
backerFeatures.specNote: Full technical datasheet — fire class, thermal value and density — available on request.

doorFeatures.introEyebrow: Crafted for hospitality · Built to protect
doorFeatures.introText: Our doors combine timeless design with advanced engineering to deliver the highest levels of safety, acoustic performance and durability — made for hotels and premium projects.

layers.title: Real wood veneer
layers.text: Natural oak veneer with a protective UV lacquer or oil finish.

layers.title: HDF stabilisation layer
layers.text: High-density fibreboard for extra stability and flatness.

layers.title: Fireproof mineral core
layers.text: Non-combustible core board for outstanding fire resistance.

layers.title: Solid hardwood edge frame
layers.text: Engineered hardwood for maximum strength and screw holding.

layers.title: Acoustic insulation layer
layers.text: High-density acoustic layer that improves sound reduction.

layers.title: Intumescent fire seal
layers.text: Expandable strip that activates in case of fire to seal gaps.

layers.title: Automatic drop seal
layers.text: Concealed drop-down seal for smoke and acoustic protection.

layers.title: Multi-point locking system
layers.text: High-quality lock for safety and long-term durability.

layers.title: Concealed 3D hinges
layers.text: Adjustable in three directions, 120 kg load capacity.

layers.title: Smoke & acoustic gasket
layers.text: Perimeter seals that block smoke, sound and light.

performance.title: Excellent acoustic insulation
performance.text: Up to 42 dB Rw sound reduction.

performance.title: Luxurious natural finishes
performance.text: Real wood veneers and premium paints.

specs.v: hotel rooms, corridors, suites, lobbies, apartments

spaces.title: Spaces
spaces.intro: Every part of the Mediterranean home asks for different materials, light and care. Explore ideas and finishes space by space.
spaces.noItems: Talk to us for tailored ideas for this space.

descriptions.bathroom: The bathroom asks for surfaces that shrug off steam and water. We bring together solid-surface basins, bathtubs and shower trays, large-format stone-look boards, brushed brassware and warm light — a calm, spa-like room built to last by the sea.
descriptions.kitchen: The kitchen is where the home gathers. Hard-wearing worktops, large-format wall boards behind the hob, micro-cement and warm timber fronts — finishes chosen for daily use, easy cleaning and the way Mediterranean light moves through the day.
descriptions.living-room: The living room is the heart of the house. Flowing stone or warm timber floors, feature walls in Flexibel Stone boards, micro-cement and lime plaster — materials that frame the view, take the afternoon sun and feel good underfoot.
descriptions.bedroom: The bedroom should feel quiet. Soft timber floors, warm lime or micro-cement walls, an upholstered headboard wall and gentle indirect light — a restful palette, with materials that breathe in the Costa Blanca climate.
descriptions.terrace: The terrace is an outdoor room. Slip-resistant stone paving, shaded pergolas, an outdoor kitchen and built-in seating — surfaces and detailing engineered for sun, salt and the Levante wind, so they look better with every season.
descriptions.garden: The garden ties the house to the land. Tumbled-stone paths, dry-stone retaining walls, native planting — olive, almond, lavender, rosemary — and considered lighting, all in materials that age gracefully outdoors.
descriptions.pool-area: The pool area takes the hardest punishment of any space: chlorine, salt and full sun. We specify pool surrounds, coping, non-slip decking and outdoor showers in finishes proven to survive — and to keep looking serene.
descriptions.outdoor-kitchen: The outdoor kitchen makes summer the main season. Stone or solid-surface worktops, large-format cladding, a built-in barbecue and storage, weatherproof joinery — everything detailed to live outdoors all year on the Costa Blanca.

projects.title: Projects
projects.intro: A look at the homes we build and renovate in and around Jávea/Xàbia — from a derelict finca to a brand-new villa. On every project the before and after sit side by side, so you can see the transformation for yourself.

services.title: Services
services.intro: Habitat One connects you with a carefully curated network of in-house specialists and external partners — architects, contractors, building specialists, lawyers, gestors and technical advisers — and guides you from first idea to completion.
services.partnerNote: We work hand in hand with professionals in Jávea/Xàbia we personally know and trust. One of them:

sale.title: Finding your home in Jávea/Xàbia
sale.intro: Independent estate agents work alongside us from the Habitat One showroom in Jávea/Xàbia. A small, hand-picked selection of villas, plots and renovation projects will be listed here soon — and you can turn any of them into a finished home with one team.
sale.soonText: We're curating a short list of properties worth your time. In the meantime, tell us what you're looking for and we'll connect you with the right agent.
sale.s1Text: Trusted independent estate agents have a desk in our Jávea/Xàbia showroom and use it to meet clients and walk them through materials and ideas.
sale.s2Text: We're putting together a small selection of villas, sea-view plots and renovation projects across Jávea/Xàbia. They'll appear here.
sale.s3Text: Bought a renovation project or a bare plot? Our architects, lawyers and builders take it from there — one project manager, one plan, one finished home.
sale.s4Text: Looking now? Send us your brief — area, budget, new build or renovation — and we'll match you with the right agent and a realistic plan.
sale.buyerCta: Tell us what you're looking for
sale.agentTitle: Are you an estate agent in Jávea/Xàbia?
sale.agentText: We host independent agents at the showroom. If you'd like a desk, the showroom and a partner for the design-and-build side, get in touch.

about.title: Habitat One
about.lead: Not a contractor, architect or realtor — but a transparent materials and building platform with an experience center, connecting you to the knowledge, materials, prices and the right network to realise your project successfully.
about.storyTitle: Building and renovating can be done differently
about.p1: At Habitat One we believe building and renovating can be done differently: more transparently, more honestly and with better choices. In our experience center you discover carefully selected materials, innovative applications and high-quality finishes for new builds and renovations — not from a catalogue, but by truly seeing, feeling and comparing them.
about.p2: We work with realtors, investors, architects, contractors, suppliers, lawyers and gestors we personally know and trust — and dare to recommend. That way we connect you directly with the right specialist for every phase of your project. Many of our clients are still in their home country; if they buy their materials through Habitat One, we handle the direction, oversight and guidance.
about.p3: The construction sector is known for complex processes, unclear pricing structures and hidden margins. We deliberately choose a different approach. We show where materials come from, who the producer is, what the purchase price is, what margin we apply and which parties are involved in your project. No hidden margins, no unclear middle layers — a clear process in which you always know where you stand.
about.p4: Habitat One gives you access to the right products, the right people and the right information. That way we build trust, prevent surprises and make better decisions possible throughout the entire building process.
about.p5: Habitat One is more than a showroom. It's the place where you build with clarity — and where your Spanish dream home becomes reality, worry-free.
about.value1Text: We show where materials come from, what they cost and what margin we apply. No hidden margins, no unclear middle layers.
about.value2Text: You don't choose materials from a catalogue. In our experience center you see, feel and compare every product before you decide.
about.value3Text: We only work with partners we personally know and trust — architects, contractors, lawyers and gestors we dare to recommend.
about.value4Text: Based in Jávea/Xàbia, we know the local climate, building styles and regulations. We're your trusted partner on the Costa Blanca.
about.ctaText: Visit our experience center in Jávea/Xàbia or get in touch — we're happy to help you make the right choices.
about.teamTitle: The people you will work with
about.teamNote: A close-knit team plus a carefully curated network of partners we personally know and trust — architects, contractors, lawyers, gestors and technical advisers on the Costa Blanca.

showroom.directionsText: In the heart of Jávea/Xàbia with free parking available — just 90 minutes from Valencia and 75 minutes from Alicante airport.

footer.ctaText: Explore carefully curated materials, innovative products and inspiring solutions for your home. Whether you're building, renovating or simply looking for ideas, our showroom is designed to help you discover what's possible. Book your visit through our website and experience Habitat One firsthand.
footer.tagline: Build, renovate and live beautifully in Jávea/Xàbia — materials, design, law and property under one Mediterranean roof.
footer.newsletterText: Material releases, project stories and the occasional house for sale. No noise.
footer.newsletterThanks: Thank you — you're on the list.
footer.builtIn: Designed & built on the Costa Blanca.

events.title: Inspiration, knowledge and the right connections
events.intro: At Habitat One we believe better building projects start with the right knowledge and the right people. That's why we host exclusive events for our members throughout the year.

items.title: Private sales day
items.text: One day of exclusive access to the showroom with sharp day prices on our in-stock materials — selected items you can take home straight away.

items.title: Flexibel Stone — applied live
items.text: See how our signature natural stone bends with the wall and feel the difference from traditional tiles.

items.title: Members evening: meet the network
items.text: An exclusive evening where, over a drink, you meet the architects, contractors, lawyers and gestors from our network. Ask your questions and make the right connections.

items.title: Open hours: building & buying in Spain
items.text: An open Q&A with our lawyers and gestors about NIE, permits, contracts and taxes — so you can start your project with confidence.

events.ctaText: Browse our events calendar and reserve your spot.
body: In inspiring workshops, presentations and knowledge sessions, architects, material specialists, building experts, lawyers, gestors and other professionals take you into the world of building, renovating and living in Spain.
Discover innovative materials, gain insight into processes, ask experts your questions directly and meet the people who can help you at every step of your project.
Our events aren't just meant to inform — above all they give you more overview, confidence and control over the choices you make.
events.tagline: Build smarter. Choose with confidence. Meet the right people.

items.title: Building in Spain: NIE, gestor and permits

items.title: Choosing materials for the Mediterranean climate
items.text: Sun, salt and humidity make demands on your finishes. Here's how to pick materials that stay beautiful by the coast.

items.title: Our open pricing
items.text: At Habitat One you see exactly what you pay for: the purchase price of the material, our margin and the execution. Open and without hidden middle layers — so you're never caught by surprise.

items.title: Indoor and outdoor in one line
items.text: By finishing indoor and outdoor with the same material, you create calm and space. We show you which collections flow seamlessly from living room to terrace.

items.title: Water vapour fireplaces: ambience without heat
items.text: Our water vapour fireplaces create a realistic flame without real fire — they don't get hot and are completely safe. Ideal for rental properties, and they instantly bring atmosphere to any room.

items.title: The bathroom as a place to unwind
items.text: From freestanding baths to solid-surface basins: our bathroom collection combines warm materials with clean design for a spa feeling at home.

items.title: Small details, big difference
items.text: It's often in the finishing touches. With design switches and sockets and characterful planters you truly complete a space — indoors and out.

items.title: Why Flexibel Stone changes everything
items.text: Real natural stone that bends with the wall — lighter than tiles and endlessly applicable. A look at our signature material.

items.text: No hidden margins, no unclear middle layers. We explain how and why we work the way we do.

items.title: Building in Jávea/Xàbia: sun, stone and sea
items.text: What makes the Mediterranean microclimate so special — and what it means for your material choices.

partners.title: Partners
partners.intro: Habitat One works with a carefully curated network of specialists we personally know and trust — and dare to recommend. That way we connect you directly with the right expert for every phase of your project.

items.text: Design and construction drawings that unite light, space and the Mediterranean climate.
Reliable local builders who carry out new builds and renovations with craft.
Legal guidance for purchase, contracts and permits — in your language.
Administrative support, from NIE number to tax matters.
Access to carefully selected homes and projects, often unique opportunities.
Advice on installations, sustainability and energy-efficient solutions.

partners.ctaText: Are you a specialist on the Costa Blanca who shares our view on transparency and quality? Get in touch.

items.a: Habitat One is not a contractor, architect or realtor, but a transparent materials and building platform with an experience center in Jávea/Xàbia. We give you access to high-quality materials, honest information and a trusted network of specialists for every phase of your project.

items.q: Do you build my house yourselves?
items.a: No. We connect you with architects, contractors, lawyers and gestors we personally know and trust. If you buy your materials through us, we also handle the direction, oversight and guidance — even while you're still in your home country.
In the heart of Jávea/Xàbia on the Costa Blanca, with free parking. Visits are always by appointment, so we can take all the time for you.

items.q: Which languages can you help me in?
items.a: Dutch, English, Spanish and German — just like this website.

items.q: What about NIE, permits and the legal side?
items.a: Building or buying in Spain requires the right paperwork. Through our network of lawyers and gestors we arrange purchase, NIE, permits and admin — in your language.
Absolutely. We work with full transparency: you see where materials come from, what they cost and how our pricing is built up. Request a quote or visit the experience center for a personal overview.

bouwen-in-spanje-nie-vergunningen.title: Building in Spain: NIE, permits and gestor — what to watch out for
bouwen-in-spanje-nie-vergunningen.intro: Building or buying a home on the Costa Blanca doesn't start with bricks — it starts with paperwork. Knowing the Spanish rules, or having the right people around you, prevents delays and surprises. Here's what to watch out for.

sections.heading: Start with your NIE number
body: The NIE (Número de Identidad de Extranjero) is your tax identification number as a foreigner in Spain. Without an NIE you can't buy a property, pay a contractor, set up utilities or pay tax. So it's literally step one.
You apply for it at a Spanish consulate in your home country, in person at the police, or through an authorised representative. Plan this early — it can take a few weeks.

sections.heading: The gestor and the lawyer: two different roles
body: In Spain a gestor handles the administrative side: NIE, taxes, registrations and forms. A lawyer (abogado) guards the legal side: purchase contracts, title checks and permits.
For a safe purchase or build you need both. Never rely solely on the selling party — an independent lawyer who represents your interest is essential.

sections.heading: Permits: from building licence to occupancy
body: For new builds or major renovations you need a building permit (licencia de obra) from the town hall. Small works often only require a licencia de obra menor.
After completion comes the occupancy certificate (cédula de habitabilidad). You need it to get water and electricity in your name. Build generous permit timelines into your planning.
points: Building permit (licencia de obra) — before you start
Occupancy certificate (cédula de habitabilidad) — at completion
Energy certificate — when selling or renting

sections.heading: Common mistakes
body: Most problems don't arise during construction, but in the paperwork beforehand: buying without an independent legal check, starting without the right permit, or buying a home that has been (partly) extended illegally. Those mistakes cost the most money and time later.

sections.heading: How Habitat One takes the hassle off your hands
body: We're not a lawyer or gestor — but we work with lawyers and gestors we personally know and trust, and who speak your language. That way the paperwork, permits and purchase are in good hands while you keep the overview. Even if you're still in your home country, we handle the direction.

bouwen-in-spanje-nie-vergunningen.ctaTitle: Questions about your project in Spain?
bouwen-in-spanje-nie-vergunningen.ctaText: Visit our experience center in Jávea/Xàbia or get in touch — we'll connect you with the right specialists.

materialen-mediterraan-klimaat.title: Choosing materials for the Mediterranean climate
materialen-mediterraan-klimaat.intro: On the Costa Blanca, sun, salt and humidity work on your home non-stop. Materials that are fine inland can quickly fade, crack or corrode by the coast. Here's how to pick finishes that stay beautiful and strong.

sections.heading: Sun, salt and humidity: the real challenge
body: The mix of fierce UV, salty sea air and high humidity is relentless. Cheap coatings fade, untreated metal rusts and porous stone draws in moisture and salt. So choose materials specifically built to resist it.

sections.heading: Materials that handle the coastal climate
body: We deliberately select finishes proven by the sea:
points: Natural stone and travertine with the right sealing — warm and timeless
Flexibel Stone: resistant to salt, sun and moisture, indoors and out
Microcement and terrazzo for seamless, hard-wearing floors
Powder-coated or stainless hardware against corrosion

sections.heading: Indoor vs. outdoor
body: Outdoors the demands are stricter: frost resistance, anti-slip by the pool and terrace, and colourfastness under full sun. Indoors it's more about feel, maintenance and acoustics. We match the right variant per space.

sections.heading: Maintenance decides the lifespan
body: Even the best material needs proper care: sealing natural stone in time, rinsing façades after sandstorms, and mild cleaners instead of aggressive products. Good advice up front prevents costly mistakes later.

materialen-mediterraan-klimaat.ctaText: Come see, feel and compare it in our experience center — we'll advise you for the coastal climate.

onze-open-prijsopbouw.title: Transparent pricing: how it works with us
onze-open-prijsopbouw.intro: The construction sector is known for vague quotes and hidden margins. At Habitat One we do it differently: you see exactly what you pay for. Here's how our price is built up.

sections.heading: Why pricing is often opaque
body: In a traditional building process there are often several middle layers between you and the manufacturer — each with its own invisible margin. So you rarely know what you really pay for the material versus the intermediaries.

sections.heading: Our build-up: purchase + margin + execution
body: We buy directly from manufacturers in Asia, Italy, Spain and other European countries. Our price has three clear parts: the purchase price of the material, our own margin, and (optionally) the execution by partners from our network.

sections.heading: What you see from us
body: When you request a quote, we put it openly on the table:
points: Where the material comes from and who the producer is
The parties involved in your project

sections.heading: Why transparency pays off
body: Open prices prevent surprises, make comparison easy and build trust. You keep control and make better decisions — exactly why you come to Habitat One.

onze-open-prijsopbouw.ctaText: Request a transparent quote or visit our experience center.

binnen-buiten-een-materiaal.title: Indoor and outdoor in one continuous material
binnen-buiten-een-materiaal.intro: Nothing feels as calm and spacious as a finish that flows seamlessly from your living room to the terrace. With the right material choice you let indoor and outdoor blend into one.

sections.heading: Why continuous materials work
body: One material from inside to out erases the boundary between spaces. The eye is drawn outward, your home feels bigger, and the Mediterranean light does the rest. On the Costa Blanca, where you live outdoors a lot, that's worth gold.

sections.heading: Materials that work indoors and out
body: Not every material can do both. These can:
points: Flexibel Stone — the same stone look on wall and façade
Large-format travertine and limestone, indoors and on the terrace
Microcement in one continuous, seamless tone
Terrazzo for floors and outdoor edges

sections.heading: Practical points to watch
body: At the transition, mind a few things: pick an anti-slip variant outside, ensure frost resistance, and allow for a slightly different finish outdoors for grip — while colour and look stay identical.

sections.heading: From idea to execution
body: In our experience center you see how collections run from inside to out, and we think along about the right transitions, thresholds and details — so the result is clean and durable.

binnen-buiten-een-materiaal.ctaTitle: Want indoor and outdoor to blend?
binnen-buiten-een-materiaal.ctaText: Visit the experience center or get in touch for tailored advice.
